message:
feat(web): implement Flywheel Velocity Dashboard

Add comprehensive velocity tracking dashboard with:
- useVelocity.ts hook with mock data and API integration
- Velocity.tsx page with 5 tabs (Overview, Stages, Learning, Trends, History)
- Velocity gauge visualization (0-100 score)
- Per-stage metrics (Plan, Coordinate, Execute, Scan, Remember)
- Learning rate tracking and improvement analysis
- Trend analysis with recommendations and forecasting
- Historical velocity comparison with bar chart

Bead: flywheel_gateway-66n

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
